    <item>
      <title>Winners, losers from NBA playoffs: Villanova alums take down Philly</title>
      <description>When the second-round series between the Philadelphia 76ers and New York Knicks moved to the City of Brotherly Love, three Knicks who spent their college years in Philly stepped up.</description>

      <title>Charles Barkley claps back at Draymond Green after on-air insult</title>

      <title>LeBron James has no reason to apologize after Lakers' Game 2 loss</title>

    <item>
      <title>Pistons vs Cavs: Cade Cunningham doesn't mince words after Game 2 win</title>
      <description>The Detroit Pistons are halfway to getting a series win following their Game 2 win over the Cleveland Cavaliers. </description>
      <pubDate>08 May 2026 09:11:42 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/pistons_vs_cavs_cade_cunningham_doesnt_mince_words_after_game_2_win/s1_13132_43819964</link>

    <item>
      <title>NBA playoffs winners, losers: Pistons, Thunder seize control with Game 2 victories</title>
      <description>The second round of the 2026 NBA playoffs continued on Thursday night with the Detroit Pistons outlasting the Cleveland Cavaliers, 107-97, and the Oklahoma City Thunder pulling away late to down the Los Angeles Lakers, 125-107.</description>
      <pubDate>08 May 2026 01:27:34 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/nba_playoffs_winners_losers_pistons_thunder_seize_control_with_game_2_victories/s1_13132_43818591</link>

        <media:credit> Alonzo Adams-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Oklahoma City Thunder guard Ajay Mitchell drives to the basket against the Los Angeles Lakers in the second half during Game 2 of the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Paycom Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>
